title: Little Girl and Problem on Trees

content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Little Girl and Problem on Trees". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/276/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of nodes in the tree. Then n-1 lines follow, each containing two integers u and v, the nodes connected by an edge. The next line contains an integer m, the number of queries. Then m lines follow, each containing two integers u and v, the nodes for which we want to find the distance.
content.outputFormat: For each query, output the distance between the two nodes on a new line.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a tree traversal algorithm (e.g., DFS or BFS) to calculate the distance between each pair of nodes.
